name: Beer-Batter Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the mushrooms and trim the stems, but do not remove all of them.
2. Heat oil in a deep fryer or deep skillet to the appropriate temperature.
3. Use either commercial mushroom batter mix or a mix like Bisquik for the batter.
4. Mix the batter according to package directions, using beer instead of water or milk.
5. Deep-fry the mushrooms until they are golden brown and drain on paper towels.
